title: madhuca ridleyi
intro: Madhuca ridleyi, also known as the Bintangor tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This tree is native to Borneo and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The seeds and leaves of the Madhuca ridleyi tree possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create ointments and topical creams.
